name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). v0.10.6 fixes a false-positive in _detect_branch_ci: the v0.10.4 substring-grep heuristic matched any Conventional Commits prefix anywhere in a workflow YAML — including paths-ignore filters. A real deploy-on-push-to-dev workflow with `paths-ignore: ['docs/**']` was misclassified as branch CI (because `docs/` matched the substring), causing wpx-pipeline to poll for 45 min waiting for check-runs that never appeared. Replaced with a structural parser that walks each .github/workflows/*.y[a]ml file looking specifically for `branches:` declarations (under on.push or on.pull_request), parsing inline lists and block lists. Explicitly rejects `branches-ignore`, `paths`, `paths-ignore`, `tags`, and comments. Two new regression tests pinned: paths-ignore must not register; branches-ignore must not register. v0.10.5 shipped the pytest test suite + two bug fixes (already-merged branch detection + multi-table INDEX parsing). v0.10.4 fixed emit_ok exit_code + no-branch-CI hang. v0.10.3 closed the auto-draft INDEX-registration gap. v0.10.2 fixed wpx-step12 dispatcher correctness. v0.10.1 fixed wpx-* tool discoverability. 43 tests across unit/ + integration/. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03. v0.10.7: wpx-pipeline's Step 10a health check now auto-detects the health path from --smoke-cmd's URL (e.g. `curl -sf https://staging/health` → /health), with --health-path flag for explicit override. Fixes the bug where APIs whose root returns 404 by design (health only at /health) produced spurious 10-minute hangs followed by health_status: unhealthy BLOCKERs. Backward-compatible: falls back to / when no URL is in the smoke command. Three regression tests pinned (49 tests total). v0.11.0: implements ADR-212 release-train / merge-queue (wpx-train tool). New per-batch path replaces the per-WP wpx-pipeline default; wpx-pipeline remains for hotfix / solo-ship via /sulis-execution:run-wp WP-X --force-single. wpx-train discovers eligibility from INDEX.md + origin branch list + per-WP CI status (no separate queue file per ADR-212 D6 amended); packs into batches up to 5 WPs; rebases each branch onto the previous rebased branch's HEAD; runs bundled-tip CI; sequential squash-merges; one deploy + health + smoke per batch. Failure modes: per-WP rebase conflict flips INDEX status to step-7-blocked + writes BLOCKER + train continues with the rest; bundled-tip CI fail flips all in-batch to step-7-blocked + writes train BLOCKER with file-overlap-heuristic culprit; post-merge deploy/health/smoke fail triggers full revert sequence (single wrapper commit on dev) + branch restoration with force-push guard (verifies origin/branch SHA equals rebased_to_sha before resetting to pre_train_sha). Step 11 security review stays per-WP, parallel, after batch deploy. New status enum values: step-7-complete (executor finished, queued for train), step-7-held (founder-paused), step-7-blocked (train failed for this WP). Polling + git/gh helpers extracted from wpx-pipeline into _wpxlib.py (Phase 0 refactor; no behaviour change to existing wpx-pipeline path). 101 tests pass (49 original + 52 new). Skill changes: /sulis-execution:run-wp default flips INDEX status (no auto-dispatch); /sulis-execution:run-all calls wpx-train run at batch boundaries; /sulis-execution:status surfaces eligible-count + trigger state; lifecycle.md documents the per-batch/per-WP split. Deferred to v0.12.0: primitive-driven batch_hint (cross-plugin SEA change); O(log N) bisect fallback to the file-overlap heuristic.
